channel.title: math.KT updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.KT updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: $E$-theory of $X$-$C^{*}$-algebras and functor formalisms
item.description: arXiv:2605.19863v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We show that $E$-theory for locally compact Hausdorff spaces constitutes a six-functor formalism which is equivalent to the six-functor formalism of $\mathrm{E}$-valued sheaves. We furthermore show that the $E$-theory category for locales that can be written as unions of finite open sublocales is equivalent to the category of $\mathrm{E}$-valued cosheaves.
item.dc:creator: Ulrich Bunke
